List SDG Geographic Areas

Source: R/sdg.R
sdg_areas.Rd

Fetches the list of geographic areas available from the UN SDG database.

Usage

sdg_areas()

Value

A tibble with area codes and names, or NULL when the service is unreachable.

See also

sdg_data().

Examples

# \donttest{
sdg_areas()
#> Fetching: <https://unstats.un.org/sdgs/UNSDGAPIV5/v1/sdg/GeoArea/List>
#> # A tibble: 460 × 2
#>    geoAreaCode geoAreaName        
#>    <chr>       <chr>              
#>  1 4           Afghanistan        
#>  2 248         Åland Islands      
#>  3 8           Albania            
#>  4 12          Algeria            
#>  5 16          American Samoa     
#>  6 20          Andorra            
#>  7 24          Angola             
#>  8 660         Anguilla           
#>  9 10          Antarctica         
#> 10 28          Antigua and Barbuda
#> # ℹ 450 more rows
# }
